form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since winning won by 3 len Dundalk All Weather January 9 over 1609m defeating Outlaw Man carrying 61kg at $2.50. form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At very long odds at debut, 4th of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 4 over 1600m, 7 len behind Conclave with 60.5kg at $201. Second-up 6th of 8 at Bath on April 5 over 2000m, 18 len behind Colourband with 54kg at $23. Can't see him troubling these.
